contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 20
- Description: Order Hit List status filters top-of-pipeline → bottom on stores_by_status DApp page
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/201
  
  Details:
  Per Gary 2026-05-03: the status filter dropdown on https://dapp.truesight.me/stores_by_status.html was in arbitrary insertion order. Reordered STATUS_OPTIONS into seven stages matching the state machine in HIT_LIST_STATE_MACHINE.md: (1) newly discovered (Research), (2) qualification outcomes (AI: Shortlisted, Shortlisted), (3) enrichment (AI: Enrich with contact, Email found, Contact Form found, Enrich — manual), (4) outreach in progress (AI: Warm up prospect, Contacted, Instagram Followed, Prospect replied, Manager Follow-up, Bulk Info Requested, Followed Up, Meeting Scheduled), (5) closed positive (Partnered), (6) holding pattern (On Hold, Deferred / Revisit later), (7) closed negative (AI: No fit signal, Rejected, Not Appropriate, then the two legacy photo states at the bottom). In-line comments make each stage boundary visible so future operators adding new statuses know where the new option belongs.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 33.33
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
